TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Ratkin Clans faction.

Translations.Comment: Rattenmensch = rat-people. Klans maintains the tribal structure. 'Ratoides' = rat-like; maintains the tribal faction feel.
Legionäre = legionaries. Organized rat-men infantry. Standard militant terminology for organized troops.
Wehrpflichtige = conscripts. Forced levies of rat-men. 'Conscriptos' emphasizes forced recruitment.
Schleicher = skulkers/sneakers. Stealthy infiltrators. 'Merodeadores' conveys sneaking/skulking behavior.
Ratkin sharpshooters with long rifles. Technological advantage. Full descriptor emphasizes the technological edge.
Schleuderer = slingers. Simple ranged troops. 'Hondero' is the traditional Spanish term for slingers.
Flammenwerfer troops. Dangerous experimental weapons. Direct translation; dangerous and ominous tone.
Monstrum = monstrosity. Twisted creation of dark experiments. 'Aberración' emphasizes the unnatural horror.
Alpha kept as term. Elite warriors of the clans. 'Alfa' retains the gaming terminology; indicates dominance.
Schwärme = swarms. Masses of vermin. 'Enjambre' evokes the overwhelming nature of swarms.
Ominous bell that tolls doom. Same as in UnitProps. 'Perdición' = perdition/doom; ominous and foreboding.
Hexenmeister = warlock. Dark magic user. 'Brujo' = warlock/sorcerer; establishes dark magic theme.
Clan leader. Cunning and ruthless. 'Jefe Tribal' emphasizes clan hierarchy and leadership.
Master spy and assassin. Sneaks behind enemy lines. 'Maestro' emphasizes skill and mastery in covert operations.
